hypothesis: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to better engage SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5 residues, and hydrophobic residues at position 11 to avoid off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 interactions.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving good selectivity but are failing due to structural issues. Tightening structural filters and increasing candidate diversity should help identify more viable candidates.

proposed_changes.rationale: Reducing the allowed clash score will enforce better structural quality and reduce steric clashes in the binding pocket.
Increasing the number of candidates will improve the chances of generating structurally valid designs that also maintain selectivity.
